name: BWNet Telecom
notes:
BWNet is a company that provides Internet access, the mission of offering quality and satisfaction to its customers.

Since 1997, the year of its founding, BWNet offers quality internet, as well as a well-trained and qualified staff to better serve the customer.

Headquartered in the city of Mandaguari, in the state of Paraná, Brazil, it counts on first-class equipment and professionals. With high technology, BWNet offers Fiber Optic, Cable and Radio Internet connectivity for Residencies, companies and government agencies.
